name: process-design
description: Process Design with extra benefits — a thought-partner skill that walks you from a fuzzy intuition to a build-ready spec via Working Backwards, metrics-first design, Elon's algorithm, gap probing, TDD-style verification, drafting, adversarial verification, and an implementation-agnostic build handoff. Bundles qa-agents (adversarial three-agent review, now with a root-cause-analysis pass on confirmed major findings) for Phase 7 verification, the dmaic skill family (Define / Measure / Analyze / Improve / Control) for metrics review cycles, elons-operating-algorithm (one-shot pressure test that runs Elon's full 5-step algorithm against any artifact — spec, plan, architecture, roadmap — and produces a structured deletion-first review), test-loop (builds the executable regression suite that locks a spec's decision rules and conventions into tests and surfaces real bugs in the process — the executable companion to dmaic-control), and birdclaw (optional data-source skill that reads and analyzes your own X/Twitter data from a local birdclaw workspace and can hand it to qa-agents for an adversarial pass). All eleven skills callable independently.
